## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Validation

- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run lint && npm test`
- [ ] `cd backend && npm run lint && npm test`
- [ ] `cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `cd backend && npx tsc --noEmit`

## Documentation

- [ ] `README.md` updated if needed
- [ ] `TECHNICAL_DECISIONS.md` updated for architecture changes
- [ ] `RELEASE.md` updated
- [ ] `ONBOARDING.md` updated if workflow changed
